sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
from collections import defaultdict
by_color = defaultdict(list)
for n in nodes:
    by_color[n['color']].append(n)

for color, nlist in sorted(by_color.items()):
    print(f"{color}: {len(nlist)} nodes")
    for n in nlist:
        if n['pixels'] <= 5:
            b = n['boundary']
            if b:
                rows = [p[0] for p in b]
                cols = [p[1] for p in b]
                print(f"  center~[{(min(rows)+max(rows))//2}, {(min(cols)+max(cols))//2}] pixels={n['pixels']}")
        else:
            b = n['boundary']
            rows = [p[0] for p in b]
            cols = [p[1] for p in b]
            print(f"  bounds=[{min(rows)},{min(cols)}]-[{max(rows)},{max(cols)}] pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
